# CLKComplicationFamily.utilitarianSmall

**Case**

A small square or rectangular area that ClockKit Displays on the Utility, Mickey, Chronograph, and Simple watch faces.

## Declaration

```swift
case utilitarianSmall
```

## Discussion

The following figure shows the size and location of the utilitarian small complication.



The utilitarian small family can display the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallFlat], [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallSquare], [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallRingText], and [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallRingImage] templates.

## Utilitarian

- **CLKComplicationFamily.utilitarianSmallFlat**: A small rectangular area that ClockKit Displays on the Photos, Motion, and Timelapse watch faces.
- **CLKComplicationFamily.utilitarianLarge**: A large rectangular area that spans the width of the screen in the Utility and Mickey watch faces.
